title: Specklinia ignota
taxonomy: Specklinia ignota belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. It is classified as a species of orchid within the genus Specklinia. The genus Specklinia is further grouped under the subfamily Epidendroideae, which is part of the larger orchid family. Within the subfamily Epidendroideae, the genus Specklinia is specifically grouped under the tribe Maxillarieae. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the broader orchid family.
